page.title: Broadcast Notifications
page.subtitle: Send announcements to all platform users or a specific user

form.cardDescription: Choose to send to all users or target a specific user.
form.warningAll: This will send a notification to all registered users. Please review your message before sending.
form.warningUser: This will send a notification to the selected user only.
form.validationError: Please fill in both title and message
form.validationUserError: Please select a user to send to

confirm.title: Confirm Broadcast
confirm.bodyAll: You are about to send the following notification to all users:
confirm.bodyUser: You are about to send the following notification to {{name}}:
confirm.undone: This action cannot be undone. Continue?
